translations.text: that this is truly a noble Quran,
in a protected Record
that only the purified can touch,
sent down from the Lord of all being.
How can you scorn this statement?
And how, in return for the livelihood you are given, can you deny it?
When the soul of a dying man comes up to his throat
while you gaze on-

text_qpc_hafs: وَنَحۡنُ أَقۡرَبُ إِلَيۡهِ مِنكُمۡ وَلَٰكِن لَّا تُبۡصِرُونَ ٨٥
text_uthmani: وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنكُمْ وَلَـٰكِن لَّا تُبْصِرُونَ

translations.text: We are nearer to him than you, though you do not see Us-
why, if you are not to be judged,
do you not restore his soul to him, if what you say is true?
If that dying person is one of those who will be brought near to God,
he will have rest, ease, and a Garden of Bliss;

text_qpc_hafs: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنۡ أَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلۡيَمِينِ ٩٠
text_uthmani: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنْ أَصْحَـٰبِ ٱلْيَمِينِ

translations.text: if he is one of those on the Right,
[he will hear], ‘Peace be on you,’ from his companions on the Right;

text_qpc_hafs: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ ٩٢
text_uthmani: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ

translations.text: but if he is one of those who denied the truth and went astray,
he will be welcomed with scalding water.
He will burn in Hell.
This is the certain truth:
[Prophet], glorify the name of your Lord the Supreme.

text_qpc_hafs: سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۖ وَهُوَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلۡحَكِيمُ ١
text_uthmani: سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ

translations.text: Everything in the heavens and earth glorifies God––He is the Almighty, the Wise.

text_qpc_hafs: لَهُۥ مُلۡكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۖ يُحۡيِۦ وَيُمِيتُۖ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءٖ قَدِيرٌ ٢
text_uthmani: لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ يُحْىِۦ وَيُمِيتُ ۖ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ

translations.text: Control of the heavens and earth belongs to Him; He gives life and death; He has power over all things.

text_qpc_hafs: هُوَ ٱلۡأَوَّلُ وَٱلۡأٓخِرُ وَٱلظَّٰهِرُ وَٱلۡبَاطِنُۖ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ عَلِيمٌ ٣
text_uthmani: هُوَ ٱلْأَوَّلُ وَٱلْـَٔاخِرُ وَٱلظَّـٰهِرُ وَٱلْبَاطِنُ ۖ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عَلِيمٌ

translations.text: He is the First and the Last; the Outer and the Inner; He has knowledge of all things.
